CommunityApplications.Profile:
Unofficial community-maintained Docker container for the Jumpcoin Qt wallet (a community cryptocurrency, ticker JUMP). This repository packages the Jumpcoin Core source tree as an all-in-one image that runs the Qt wallet in a headless X server and exposes the GUI via noVNC in any modern browser - no display server, no VNC client, just a browser tab.
USE AT YOUR OWN RISK. This is an unofficial, community-maintained container, not affiliated with the original Jumpcoin developers or the Jumperbillijumper YouTube channel. See the README for the full disclaimer and data-persistence instructions.
